mapper.select: SELECT * FROM BOOK ORDER BY BOOK_ID DESC OFFSET #{start} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{end} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO BOOK ( BOOK_ID, TITLE, AUTHOR, PUBLISHER, PUBLISH_DATE, CATEGORY, RANKING, REVIEW_COUNT, RATING, DESCRIPTION, PAGES, PRICE, BOOK_COVER, REG_DATE ) VALUES ( SEQ_BOOK.NEXTVAL, #{title}, #{author}, #{publisher}, TO_DATE(#{publishDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{category}, #{ranking}, #{reviewCount}, #{rating}, #{description}, #{pages}, #{price}, #{bookCover}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE BOOK SET TITLE = #{title}, AUTHOR = #{author}, PUBLISHER = #{publisher}, PUBLISH_DATE = TO_DATE(#{publishDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), CATEGORY = #{category}, RANKING = #{ranking}, REVIEW_COUNT = #{reviewCount}, RATING = #{rating}, DESCRIPTION = #{description}, PAGES = #{pages}, PRICE = #{price}, BOOK_COVER = #{bookCover} WHERE BOOK_ID = #{bookId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM BOOK WHERE CATEGORY = #{category} ORDER BY BOOK_ID DESC
SELECT * FROM BOOK WHERE TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ORDER BY BOOK_ID DESC
